label: About
title: About Black Tape Scan Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 70 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around MIXTAPES and Anchor image material 1, plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Black Tape Scan Field: Make a scanned archive object seen in overhead scan: one large uninterrupted dark, smoky-blue field, almost empty, with sparse source-bearing interruptions embedded in the surface. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against lower torn color-cover aperture, upper-right torn yellow-cyan window, and center pinhole and teal thread seam.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
